answer:
The determinant is calculated as follows:

\[
\Delta = \begin{vmatrix}
1 & -4 & -5 \\
1 & 2 & 3 \\
-3 & 1 & -2
\end{vmatrix}
\]

Expanding along the first row:
\[
\Delta = 1 \cdot \begin{vmatrix} 2 & 3 \\ 1 & -2 \end{vmatrix} - (-4) \cdot \begin{vmatrix} 1 & 3 \\ -3 & -2 \end{vmatrix} + (-5) \cdot \begin{vmatrix} 1 & 2 \\ -3 & 1 \end{vmatrix}
\]
\[
= 1 \cdot (-4 - 3) + 4 \cdot (2 + 9) - 5 \cdot (1 + 6) = -7 + 44 - 35 = 2
\]
